title: Cremaspora microcarpa

taxonomy: Cremaspora microcarpa is a species of fungus in the family Parmeliaceae. It belongs to the genus Cremaspora and is classified as an ascomycete. This species is often found growing on rocks and trees in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Cremaspora microcarpa is further supported by its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis. More specifically, it is classified in the phylum Ascomycota and kingdom Fungi.
